name: PipelineQueue
description: Processing pipeline state — singleton document per vault tracking tasks through extract, connect, reweave, and verify phases with handoff protocol.

global.schema:
enum TaskStatus {
    PENDING
    IN_PROGRESS
    BLOCKED
    DONE
    FAILED
}

enum LearningCategory {
    FRICTION
    SURPRISE
    METHODOLOGY
    PROCESS_GAP
}

type PhaseLearning {
    id: OID!
    category: LearningCategory!
    description: String!
}

type PhaseHandoff {
    id: OID!
    phase: String!
    workDone: String!
    filesModified: [String!]!
    learnings: [PhaseLearning!]!
    completedAt: DateTime!
    completedBy: String
}

type PipelineTask {
    id: OID!
    taskType: String!
    status: TaskStatus!
    target: String!
    batchId: String
    documentRef: String
    currentPhase: String
    completedPhases: [String!]!
    handoffs: [PhaseHandoff!]!
    assignedTo: String
    createdAt: DateTime!
    updatedAt: DateTime
}

type PhaseOrderEntry {
    taskType: String!
    phases: [String!]!
}

type PipelineQueueState {
    schemaVersion: Int!
    phaseOrder: [PhaseOrderEntry!]!
    tasks: [PipelineTask!]!
    completedCount: Int!
    activeCount: Int!
    lastProcessedAt: DateTime
}

modules.name: queue-management
modules.description: Pipeline task lifecycle and phase progression

operations.name: ADD_TASK
operations.description: Add a new task to the pipeline
operations.schema:
input AddTaskInput {
    id: OID!
    taskType: String!
    target: String!
    batchId: String
    documentRef: String
    currentPhase: String
    createdAt: DateTime!
}
operations.template: Add a new task to the pipeline

operations.name: ASSIGN_TASK
operations.description: Assign task to a processor or user
operations.template: Assign task to a processor or user

operations.name: ADVANCE_PHASE
operations.description: Complete current phase, advance to next
operations.template: Complete current phase, advance to next

operations.name: COMPLETE_TASK
FAIL_TASK
BLOCK_TASK
UNBLOCK_TASK

errors.name: InvalidTaskStatusError
errors.description: Task is not in the expected status
